methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Defense & Security (found 0 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 21 same-sector peers exist in Defense & Security, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

data.narrative:
Ukrspecsystems is a growth-stage defense and security company founded by Kostyuk Vyacheslav Nikolaevich, operating within a sector represented by 21 documented peers. The comparable universe includes two public companies (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and eight private firms, anchored by high-profile names such as Anduril Industries, Scale AI, Saronic, Flock Safety, and Shield AI.

Standard peer-median valuation methodology is not applicable here. The screening process identified zero same-stage comparables, one adjacent-stage peer, and zero similar-tier companies—falling below the three-datapoint minimum required for statistical reliability. Applying an all-sector median would introduce substantial distortion given the heterogeneity of defense and security valuations across different subsectors, geographies, and business models. Consequently, this analysis cannot proceed via conventional triangulation.

Without sufficient narrow peer anchoring or disclosed financial metrics (revenue, EBITDA, growth rates) for the target or comparable set, a quantitative valuation range cannot be responsibly derived. Any valuation estimate would rest primarily on subjective judgment regarding funding stage, capital raised (MoD contract revenue), and sector multiples—variables insufficient for triangulation. Further analysis requires either: (1) disclosure of Ukrspecsystems' financial performance, (2) identification of additional same-stage or adjacent-stage defense technology peers with published valuations, or (3) application of alternative methods (discounted cash flow, precedent transactions) supported by operational data.
